items.titolo: Can Cursor Remain a Platform for OpenAI and Anthropic’s Models Inside SpaceX?
items.descrizione: Cursor hopes to continue offering third-party AI models after it's acquired by SpaceX, testing the relationships between frontier AI labs.

items.titolo: Fable 5 just set a new AI freelance work performance record - but it can't replace humans yet
items.descrizione: The newly reinstated Anthropic model topped charts for automating work. Here's what that means for the future.
